Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Void (Cradle)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The void was a reflection of Lindon.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — Ships use portals to travel through the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Void is a place one can open a hole into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Emptying a vessel is within the concept of the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Galaxies crumble into the Void.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Void is a source of crackling darkness that distorts the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Void is a place where words can spread and echo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Fathom is located between the Way and the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Mad King tore open a hole to the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Void quivers in fear of the Mad King.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Bodies are strewn into the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Void is a dark space that can be accessed via portals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Void is a place that can be reached through a tear in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Twisted force exploded out of the Void where the portal had been.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Void is a concept related to insights that lead to the summoning of Fiends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Red Faith would rather toss his soul to the nameless creatures in the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — The Void is associated with coldness.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — The Void is a place beyond the parting of space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The dragon's breath contained Void authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Void contains pieces of dead worlds floating in balls of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Void attempts to break down existing beings and unmake them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The Void is something one might thank for ending up in a United Realm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 38''' — The Void presses in close in this iteration.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Void is an influence that can affect unstable Pioneer worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Wolf's grin belongs more to the madness of the Void than the order of the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Void is a hostile emptiness outside of the cosmos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Sight is not Jek'nan's sharpest sense in the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — There was raw matter available in the Void.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
